name: Piquant Lemon Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the rice.
2. Bring water to a boil in a saucepan.
3. Stir in the rice, salt, and 1/2 tablespoon ghee into the boiling water. Cover with a tight-fitting lid.
4. Reduce heat to very low and gently simmer for 20 to 25 minutes until the rice is light and fluffy and all the water has been absorbed. Set aside, leaving the pot covered.
5. Heat the remaining ghee in a small saucepan over moderate heat until hot. Drop in the cashews and stir-fry until golden brown. Remove with a slotted spoon and pour over the rice. Cover again.
6. Raise the heat slightly and toss in the split peas and mustard seeds (you may omit the peas). Fry until the seeds turn grey and sputter.
7. Pour the fried seeds into the rice and sprinkle with turmeric, lemon juice, and coriander. Gently fold everything together until well mixed.
8. Garnish each serving with shredded coconut. For a variation, substitute lime juice for lemon juice.
